verses.text: Kumpipa Ahasueras in a ukna gam leitung leh tuikulh tunga tengte tung panin siah kai hi
Ama vangliatna leh a sepnate khempeuh, leh Mordekai tungah a piak minphatnate, Media leh Persia Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpipa Ahasueras' zomah Mordekai a lianpen ahi hi. Mordekai in ama mite' phattuamna ding leh a suanlekhakte uh a khan'tohna ding hanciam ahih manin Jew mite lakah milian khat hi a, a gam mihonpite in a it kim uh hi.
